---
name: Feature Request
description: Propose a new feature or enhancement for PAI Oncology Trial FL
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
---

## Category

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Federated learning (aggregation strategies, convergence, client management)
- [ ] Physical AI (simulation, robotics, sensor fusion, framework interop)
- [ ] Privacy (differential privacy, secure aggregation, de-identification, PHI detection)
- [ ] Regulatory (compliance checks, FDA submissions, audit tooling, templates)
- [ ] Unification (data harmonization, site enrollment, cross-module integration)
- [ ] Digital twins (tumor models, treatment simulation, uncertainty quantification)
- [ ] Agentic AI (autonomous workflows, agent-based orchestration, decision support)
- [ ] CLI tools (command-line interfaces, scripts, developer tooling)

## Problem or Gap

<!--
  Describe the problem, limitation, or gap in current functionality that
  this feature would address.
  Use the format: "Currently, ... This means that ..."
-->



## Proposed Solution

<!--
  Describe what you would like to happen. Be as specific as possible about
  the API, behavior, or workflow you envision.
  Include code sketches, pseudocode, or interface designs if helpful.
-->



## Clinical Relevance

<!--
  Explain how this feature relates to oncology clinical trials, federated
  learning in healthcare, or physical AI in a clinical context.

  For example:
  - Which clinical workflow does this support or improve?
  - Does this address a regulatory requirement?
  - Would this improve patient safety, data privacy, or scientific rigor?

  If the feature is purely infrastructural (e.g., CI tooling, developer
  experience), you may write "Infrastructure improvement" and briefly
  explain the indirect benefit.
-->



## Implementation Notes

<!--
  Optional. Provide any technical details that may help with implementation:
  - Which modules would be affected?
  - Are there upstream dependencies or framework requirements?
  - Are there relevant papers, standards, or reference implementations?
  - What are the testing considerations?
  - Are there any privacy, safety, or compliance implications?
-->



## Alternatives Considered

<!--
  Optional. Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have
  considered and why the proposed solution is preferred.
-->



## Additional Context

<!--
  Optional. Add any other context, mockups, references, or links that
  support this feature request.
-->
